description_long: This is a transparent pint glass filled with a golden-yellow, effervescent liquid, topped with a thick, foamy white head. The glass has a slightly curved, hourglass shape, with a wider top and bottom and a narrower middle section. The beer inside is visibly carbonated, with small bubbles rising through the liquid. The foam head appears dense and creamy, sitting just above the rim of the glass. The glass itself is clear and smooth, allowing the color and clarity of the beer to be easily seen. There are no visible labels, logos, or decorative elements on the glass.
description: A clear pint glass filled with golden, bubbly beer and topped with a thick white foam head. The glass is smooth, transparent, and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view of a transparent pint glass showing golden beer with a foamy white head, bubbles visible through the glass.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view of the glass, still showing the golden beer and foam, with the curvature of the glass more apparent.
description_view_2: Another angled view, highlighting the clarity of the glass and the even distribution of foam and bubbles.
description_view_3: Rear view of the glass, similar to the front, with the golden beer and foam head clearly visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The exterior is completely clear and unadorned, with no visible labels, graphics, or text. The design is minimalist, focusing on the transparency of the glass and the visual appeal of the beer and foam inside.
